key.name: icon-size
key.summary: Resting icon size in pixels

key.name: magnification
key.summary: Peak magnification factor under the cursor

key.name: zoom-range
key.summary: Gaussian magnification spread radius in pixels

key.name: magnification-curve
key.summary: Magnification curve shape; higher values make the peak sharper

key.name: edge-margin
key.summary: Floating gap between dock and screen edge in pixels

key.name: dock-position
key.summary: Dock screen position: bottom, left or right (all floating)

key.name: background-opacity
key.summary: Dock background opacity

key.name: pill-color
key.summary: Dock pill background colour (CSS color string)

key.name: dock-radius
key.summary: Dock corner radius in pixels

key.name: pill-thickness
key.summary: Dock pill thickness in pixels

key.name: pill-thickness-auto
key.summary: Automatically scale pill thickness with icon size

key.name: dock-scale
key.summary: Overall dock scale multiplier (scales icons, padding and pill together)

key.name: auto-hide-mode
key.summary: Auto-hide mode: never, intellihide (hide only when covered), or always hide

key.name: hide-delay
key.summary: Milliseconds before auto-hide triggers

key.name: reveal-pressure
key.summary: Reveal pressure threshold in milliseconds; 0 = immediate

key.name: pressure-sense
key.summary: Enable pressure-sense dwell reveal; pointer must linger at the screen edge before the dock appears

key.name: pressure-sense-sensitivity
key.summary: Pressure-sense sensitivity; higher values require fewer dwell frames to reveal

key.name: click-to-minimize
key.summary: Clicking the focused app icon minimizes its windows

key.name: drag-to-open
key.summary: Drag an icon outside the dock to launch or activate the app

key.name: isolate-workspaces
key.summary: Only show running apps from the current workspace

key.name: show-apps-button
key.summary: Show Applications grid button

key.name: apps-button-icon
key.summary: Custom icon for Applications button: theme name or absolute path

key.name: show-trash
key.summary: Show trash icon with dynamic full/empty state

key.name: show-downloads
key.summary: Show Downloads folder stack with bounce on new file

key.name: indicator-style
key.summary: Running application indicator style

key.name: indicator-size
key.summary: Running indicator dot size in pixels

key.name: indicator-color
key.summary: Running indicator color (CSS hex)

key.name: show-window-count
key.summary: Show multiple dots for multiple windows

key.name: animation-smoothness
key.summary: Magnification follow time-constant in ms; lower = snappier

key.name: spring-tension
key.summary: Spring tension for physics animations

key.name: spring-damping
key.summary: Spring damping (1.0 = critically damped, no overshoot)

key.name: bounce-height
key.summary: Launch bounce height in pixels; 0 disables bounce

key.name: bounce-decay
key.summary: Bounce height decay per hop (each bounce is this fraction of the previous); higher = more, gentler bounces

key.name: enable-genie-effect
key.summary: Enable genie (magic lamp) minimize/restore effect

key.name: hover-lift
key.summary: Icon lift in pixels on hover; 0 disables lift

key.name: show-tooltip
key.summary: Show app name tooltip on hover

key.name: tooltip-delay
key.summary: Tooltip show delay in milliseconds

key.name: tooltip-radius
key.summary: Tooltip pill corner radius in pixels

key.name: tooltip-bg-color
key.summary: Tooltip pill background colour and opacity (CSS color string)

key.name: tooltip-text-color
key.summary: Tooltip app-name text colour (CSS color string)

key.name: tooltip-border-color
key.summary: Tooltip border colour (CSS color string)

key.name: tooltip-border-width
key.summary: Tooltip border width in pixels; 0 disables border

key.name: menu-radius
key.summary: Context menu corner radius in pixels

key.name: menu-bg-color
key.summary: Context menu background colour and opacity (CSS color string)

key.name: menu-text-color
key.summary: Context menu item text colour (CSS color string)

key.name: menu-border-color
key.summary: Context menu border colour (CSS color string)

key.name: menu-border-width
key.summary: Context menu border width in pixels; 0 disables border

key.name: show-previews
key.summary: Show live window thumbnails on hover

key.name: preview-delay
key.summary: Window preview show delay in milliseconds

key.name: preview-size
key.summary: Window preview thumbnail max width in pixels

key.name: show-badges
key.summary: Show notification count badges

key.name: badge-color
key.summary: Notification badge background colour (CSS color string)

key.name: badge-text-color
key.summary: Notification badge text colour (CSS color string)

key.name: downloads-view
key.summary: Default Downloads stack opening view

key.name: downloads-max-files
key.summary: Maximum number of files shown in the Downloads stack (all views)

key.name: downloads-pill-color
key.summary: Downloads panel background colour (CSS color string)

key.name: downloads-border-radius
key.summary: Downloads panel corner radius in pixels

key.name: downloads-border-color
key.summary: Downloads panel border colour (CSS color string)

key.name: downloads-border-width
key.summary: Downloads panel border width in pixels; 0 disables

key.name: downloads-item-color
key.summary: Downloads file card background colour (CSS color string)

key.name: downloads-item-radius
key.summary: Downloads file card corner radius in pixels

key.name: downloads-item-border-color
key.summary: Downloads file card border colour (CSS color string)

key.name: downloads-item-border-width
key.summary: Downloads file card border width in pixels; 0 disables

key.name: downloads-item-thumb-color
key.summary: Downloads file card thumbnail background colour

key.name: downloads-item-font-color
key.summary: Downloads file card text colour

key.name: border-color
key.summary: Dock and all pills border color (CSS color string)

key.name: border-width
key.summary: Dock and all pills border width in pixels; 0 disables border

key.name: genie-duration
key.summary: Genie (magic lamp) effect duration in milliseconds
